steps.name: reproduce
steps.prompt: Create a minimal reproduction of the reported bug. Confirm the failure and capture exact error output. Do not fix anything yet.

steps.name: trace
steps.prompt: Trace the bug to its root cause using read-only tools. Identify the file(s) and function(s) responsible. Summarize the cause.

steps.name: fix
steps.prompt: Implement the smallest correct fix for the root cause identified above. Add or update tests to cover the bug. Summarize the change.

steps.name: verify
steps.prompt: Run the reproduction and relevant tests to confirm the bug is fixed and nothing else is broken. Report results.
